name: Mimecast
description: Email security platform that protects organizations from email-based threats including phishing, malware, and spam

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Mimecast Administration Console
2. Navigate to Administration > Services > API and Platform Integrations
3. Create a new API 2.0 Application
4. Select required scopes: user/read, account/read
5. Copy Client ID and Client Secret
6. Enter your region (found in your Admin Console URL, e.g., 'US' for us1.mimecast.com)

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your Mimecast region (US, EU, DE, AU, ZA, etc.). Found in your Mimecast Admin Console URL.

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth Application Client ID from Mimecast Administration Console > Services > API and Platform Integrations

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth Application Client Secret from your API application

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies anti-malware policies and security monitoring configurations are in place
